hero.badge: Available for freelance and consulting work

hero.code.name: Mostafa Saqly
about.title: Engineering products with clean architecture and real business value
about.description: I build scalable Angular applications with strong UI foundations, maintainable code structure, and bilingual user experiences tailored for modern SaaS products.
about.summary.title: Who I am
about.summary.p1: I am a Senior Angular Engineer focused on building front-end systems that are clean, fast, scalable, and production-ready. My work combines architecture, UI engineering, performance, and developer experience.
about.summary.p2: I care about writing maintainable code, creating reusable components, supporting Arabic and English interfaces, and delivering product experiences that feel polished from both technical and visual perspectives.
about.achievement.angular: Strong experience building Angular applications with modern patterns
about.achievement.architecture: Focus on scalable project structure and maintainable code
about.achievement.localization: Practical experience with Arabic RTL and English LTR products
about.values.cleanCode.title: Clean Code
about.values.cleanCode.description: Readable, maintainable, and scalable implementation with strong engineering standards.
about.values.scalability.title: Scalable UI
about.values.scalability.description: Reusable components and consistent design patterns that grow with the product.
about.values.business.title: Product Mindset
about.values.business.description: Building features that serve real user needs and support business goals.
about.values.userExperience.title: User Experience
about.values.userExperience.description: Designing intuitive interfaces that deliver fast and seamless user experiences.
tech.title: Tools and technologies I use to build modern SaaS products
tech.description: A practical stack focused on scalable full architecture, polished interfaces, maintainable systems, and efficient product delivery.
projects.title: Selected Angular projects that reflect architecture, UI quality, and practical product thinking
projects.description: A curated set of projects that demonstrate how I approach scalable Angular development, front-end architecture, component design, and real implementation quality.
projects.items.platzi.title: Platzi Dashboard
projects.items.platzi.description: A dashboard-oriented Angular project focused on structured UI, reusable sections, and clean front-end implementation patterns.
projects.items.platzi.highlight1: Organized dashboard layout with reusable UI structure
projects.items.platzi.highlight2: Clear Angular-based implementation suitable for scaling
projects.items.platzi.highlight3: Strong focus on maintainable component composition
projects.items.angular21.title: Angular 21 Playground
projects.items.angular21.description: An Angular 21-focused project exploring modern framework capabilities such as standalone architecture, cleaner structure, and newer development patterns.
projects.items.angular21.highlight2: Uses a cleaner component-first architecture approach
projects.items.angular21.highlight3: Reflects practical experimentation with modern Angular features
projects.featuredDescription: A curated selection of projects that reflect my Angular, product, and engineering mindset.
projects.allDescription: A strong collection of shipped work, demos, and reusable engineering solutions.
projects.items.angularSupabaseCrud.title: Angular Supabase CRUD
projects.items.angularSupabaseCrud.descr: A practical CRUD application built with Angular and Supabase, focused on clean structure and real-world frontend workflows.
projects.items.angularSupabaseCrud.highl: Angular-based CRUD flow with practical data handling
Clean structure suitable for learning and extension
projects.items.saasify.title: Saasify App
projects.items.saasify.description: A SaaS-style application focused on polished UI, structured product thinking, and modern frontend presentation.
projects.items.saasify.highlight3: Strong visual hierarchy and responsive design
projects.items.smartInvoice.title: Smart Invoice Generator
projects.items.smartInvoice.description: A smart invoice experience built around productivity, form workflows, and clean dashboard design.
projects.items.smartInvoice.highlight2: Clean dashboard style for business use cases
projects.items.smartInvoice.highlight3: Built to showcase practical frontend product thinking
projects.items.saqlyng.title: saqlyng Package
projects.items.saqlyng.description: An Angular package project focused on reusable patterns, library thinking, and component reusability.
projects.items.saqlyng.highlight3: Includes both source code and walkthrough video
opensource.title: npm Packages & VS Code Extension
opensource.description: Reusable Angular packages and developer tools I published for the community.
opensource.items.login.desc: A ready-to-use Angular login UI component with form validation, clean design, and easy integration. Drop it into any Angular project and configure it to your auth flow.
opensource.items.workBalance.desc: An Angular component that helps developers and teams visualize and track work-life balance metrics. Configurable and easy to embed in productivity dashboards.
opensource.items.supabase.desc: An Angular service wrapper for Supabase — simplifies auth, database queries, and real-time subscriptions with a clean and typed API surface.
opensource.items.arabDevSnippets.desc: A VS Code extension providing Arabic-friendly code snippets for Angular, TypeScript, and frontend development. Built for Arab developers who prefer reading hints in their native language.
services.title: Services designed to help founders, teams, and individuals ship better Angular products
services.description: A focused set of services built around Angular architecture, modern front-end delivery, product execution, mentoring, and technical decision-making.
services.items.angularDevelopment.title: Angular Development
services.items.angularDevelopment.descri: End-to-end Angular development for scalable, maintainable, and production-ready web applications.
services.items.angularDevelopment.bullet: Standalone components and scalable front-end structure
Reusable UI systems with clean implementation
Modern Angular patterns with strong maintainability
services.items.saasMvp.title: SaaS MVP Development
services.items.saasMvp.description: Fast and structured MVP development for SaaS ideas with a strong focus on UI clarity, scalability, and execution quality.
services.items.saasMvp.bullet1: Landing pages, dashboards, and key product flows
services.items.saasMvp.bullet2: Clean front-end architecture ready to grow
services.items.saasMvp.bullet3: Practical delivery for real product goals
services.items.mentoring.title: One-to-One Mentoring
services.items.mentoring.description: Focused mentoring sessions for Angular developers who want clearer architecture, stronger implementation habits, and better project thinking.
services.items.mentoring.bullet1: Code structure and project organization guidance
services.items.mentoring.bullet2: Angular best practices and modern patterns
services.items.mentoring.bullet3: Practical feedback tailored to your current level
services.items.consultation.title: Technical Consultation
services.items.consultation.description: Technical guidance to help teams or individuals make better front-end decisions around architecture, UX, stack choices, and delivery strategy.
services.items.consultation.bullet3: Decision support for faster and cleaner execution
services.items.corporateTraining.title: Corporate Training for Organizations
services.items.corporateTraining.descrip: Structured Angular and front-end training programs designed for development teams inside companies, from fundamentals to advanced architecture.
services.items.corporateTraining.bullet1: Tailored curriculum for your team's stack and level
services.items.corporateTraining.bullet2: Hands-on workshops with real project scenarios
contact.title: Let’s discuss your next Angular product or collaboration
contact.description: Whether you need a scalable Angular application, an MVP, mentoring, or technical direction, send your details and I will get back to you.
contact.info.title: Let’s work together
contact.info.description: Share a few details about your idea, your current product, or the help you need. The form is designed to keep the process simple and clear.

courses.hero.title: Add Professional Arabic Courses to Your Center and Generate Real Revenue

courses.notice: Important: Coupons in each package are valid for 30 days from the delivery date. Once expired, coupons cannot be reactivated. Seats are limited per partner and this offer is valid for 30 days.
